creator: rozhuk.im@gmail.com
text:
This is FreeBSD 13 amd64 @ latest commits + ports @ latest commits.
Build from ports, no pudrile.
php 8.0.

I do small googling.
Probably port requires net/xmlrpc-epi, but xmlrpc-c installed and they conflict.
Or xmlrpc-epi-php.c is wrongly compiled and must be some other xml wrapper must be used, that capable with xmlrpc-c.
